---
title: "Session Report"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%B %d, %Y')`"
output:
  pdf_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
params:
  session_id: ""
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE,
                      fig.width = 7, fig.height = 4)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

ANALYTICS_HOME <- Sys.getenv("ANALYTICS_HOME", ".")
source(file.path(ANALYTICS_HOME, "config.R"))
source(file.path(ANALYTICS_HOME, "scripts", "utils.R"))
source(file.path(ANALYTICS_HOME, "analysis", "session_analysis.R"))
source(file.path(ANALYTICS_HOME, "analysis", "change_point_detection.R"))

session_id <- params$session_id
sa         <- session_analysis(session_id)
cp         <- change_point_detection(session_id)
```

---

**Course:** `r sa$session_meta$course_code` – `r sa$session_meta$course_title`  
**Lecturer:** `r sa$session_meta$lecturer_name`  
**Start:** `r sa$session_meta$actual_start`  
**Students Present:** `r sa$n_present`

---

## 1. Engagement Timeline

```{r eng-timeline}
et <- sa$engagement_timeline
if (nrow(et) > 0) {
  cp_times <- as.POSIXct(cp$changepoints)
  p <- ggplot(et, aes(x = captured_at, y = engagement_val)) +
    geom_line(colour = "#90CAF9", linewidth = 0.6) +
    geom_line(aes(y = smooth_eng), colour = "#1565C0", linewidth = 1.2) +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), labels = scales::percent) +
    labs(x = "Time", y = "Engagement", title = "Class Engagement Over Session")
  if (length(cp_times) > 0) {
    p <- p + geom_vline(xintercept = as.numeric(cp_times),
                        linetype = "dashed", colour = "red", alpha = 0.7)
  }
  print(p)
} else {
  cat("No engagement data.")
}
```

## 2. Concentration Heatmap

```{r conc-heatmap}
ch <- sa$conc_heatmap
if (nrow(ch) > 0) {
  ggplot(ch, aes(x = reorder(student_name, avg_conc), y = 1, fill = avg_conc)) +
    geom_tile(colour = "white") +
    scale_fill_gradient(low = "#EF5350", high = "#66BB6A",
                        limits = c(0, 100), name = "Conc.") +
    coord_flip() +
    labs(x = "Student", y = "",
         title = "Per-Student Average Concentration") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(),
          axis.ticks.x = element_blank())
} else {
  cat("No concentration data.")
}
```

## 3. Emotion Distribution

```{r emo-dist}
ed <- sa$emotion_dist
if (nrow(ed) > 0) {
  ggplot(ed, aes(x = reorder(emotion, -count), y = count, fill = emotion)) +
    geom_col(show.legend = FALSE) +
    scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
    labs(x = "Emotion", y = "Count", title = "Emotion Distribution") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1))
} else {
  cat("No emotion data.")
}
```

## 4. Alerts Log

```{r alerts-log}
al <- sa$alerts
if (nrow(al) > 0) {
  knitr::kable(
    al[, c("alert_type","severity","message","triggered_at")],
    col.names = c("Type","Severity","Message","Triggered At")
  )
} else {
  cat("No alerts during this session.")
}
```

## 5. Change-Point Summary

```{r cp-summary}
if (length(cp$changepoints) > 0) {
  cat(sprintf("Engagement change point(s) detected at:\n%s\n",
              paste(cp$changepoints, collapse = "\n")))
} else {
  cat("No significant engagement change points detected.")
}
```
